posts.text: Today is March 15th, 2026 and Donald J. Trump is the President of the United States of America.

Yesterday’s show was a wake up call. The video of the young man so casually discussing a plot to brutally murder another conservative commentator during a debate, was troubling to watch. I’m having a really hard time processing how we got here. 

Yes, we live in a peerless country, full of kind-hearted and giving people. But there’s a festering infection growing, and it must be stopped. Arendt’s “banality of evil” is on my mind often lately. People I once respected have let the evil in, and it’s

This deeply disturbing video is a warning for all of us.
Don’t miss my show today on Rumble, watch here. 👇🏻
rumble.com/v771zds-this-dist…

Katie Daviscourt 📸 (@KatieDaviscourt)

Breaking: A Texas jury has found all nine Antifa defendants guilty of terrorism charges in ICE detention facility ambush shooting.

This is the first Antifa terrorism case brought to trial in the US.
